title: Additional languages for study scaffolding (beyond Spanish)
context: Beyond Spanish, additional languages widen access to the study scaffolding (UI, rationales, glossary) while test items stay in the official test language. The language set is open-ended and expands per partner demand; this is a representative backlog task, not a fixed enumeration (no specific languages are fabricated here). Per-language accuracy review required.
objective: Add study-scaffolding translations for additional languages (beyond Spanish) on partner demand, each per-language accuracy-reviewed, with test items kept in the official language.
acceptanceCriteria: Each added language translates UI, rationales, and glossary while keeping test items in the official test language
Each language set is accuracy-reviewed per language before ship
Languages added per confirmed partner demand (this row expands into per-language tasks on confirmation; not pre-fabricated)
